title: cystopteris fragilis var. sempervirens
intro: Cystopteris fragilis var. sempervirens, also known as the evergreen bladder fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the Cystopteridaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cystopteris fragilis var. sempervirens include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as infusions and salves.
